subcodes.first_line: O thou dear maidservant of God! Thy letter was received. Praise God! for thou didst hear the call of the Kingdom, wast awakened
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه تو رسید حمد کن خدا را که ندای ملکوت شنیدی و بیدار گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @unity; oneness of humanity
